root_cause: Report Evidence Gate hijacked legitimate senior-developer answers. TIME_PROMISE_REGEX matched bare numeric elapsed-time statements ('27 minutes ago') as delivery promises, and DELIVERABLE_CONTEXT_REGEX matched 'report' as a verb ('inspect and report the commit') as a deliverable noun. Together they rewrote a senior-developer status answer to the 'REPORT NOT READY' message, blocking IVX IA from answering as a senior developer in Owner Chat.
changes_summary: TIME_PROMISE_REGEX: bare numeric time arm now requires the 'more' modifier ('30 more minutes'); factual elapsed-time facts ('27 minutes ago') pass through.
DELIVERABLE_CONTEXT_REGEX: now requires a determiner+noun ('the report is') or a conjugated verb stem ('delivering/finalizing'); verb-form 'report' no longer triggers the deliverable context.

Added 5 regression tests covering: verb-form report + elapsed time (not flagged), full gate passthrough, real fake-deliverable claim still blocked, real deferred-delivery promise still blocked, noun-form deliverable claim still blocked.
tests_run: Full backend suite: 1034 pass / 21 pre-existing failures (unrelated test-isolation issues in ivx-owner-variables-e2e + role-agent tests, confirmed pre-existing via git stash)
tests_result: 86 pass / 0 fail (evidence-gate scope); 0 new failures introduced
github_push_method: clean cherry-pick from senior-dev-fix branch to main (no force-push, no remote history destruction)

live_chat_verification.before_fix: REPORT NOT READY — answer hijacked by false-positive time-promise + verb-form-report match
live_chat_verification.after_fix: Real grounded senior-developer answer returned — names 3 active deals (Perez Residence, Casa Rosario, One Stop Constructors), ranking engine status, and 3 concrete pending tasks. No 'REPORT NOT READY' rewrite.

platform_access.android: Owner Chat accessible via expo app (public /api/public/chat endpoint, 200 OK)
platform_access.ios: Owner Chat accessible via ios-ivx app (public /api/public/chat endpoint, 200 OK)
platform_access.web: Owner Chat accessible via https://ivxholding.com (public /api/public/chat endpoint, 200 OK)
